category_sources: source_facts.description identifies zzuf as a transparent application input fuzzer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both give zzuf.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official zzuf project wiki.
source_facts.repo provides the official GitHub project, whose README is the fallback documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says transparent application input fuzzer.
source_facts.executables lists command-line tools zzat and zzuf.
